columns.description: Four-digit year derived from session_date for physical partitioning.
columns.name: session_year

columns.description: Provider historical date query and XNYS session for the version group.
columns.name: session_date

columns.description: Exact request active flag shared by the group; active and inactive sets are never merged.
columns.name: requested_active

columns.description: Exact case-sensitive provider ticker shared by the group, without normalization.
columns.name: ticker

columns.description: stable_digest of the exact mapping {requested_active: native bool, session_date: ISO date string, ticker: exact string}, using lexicographically sorted JSON keys.
columns.name: version_group_id

columns.description: Number of source observations in the multi-row version group; always greater than one.
columns.name: version_count

columns.description: Parent asset_observation_daily source_record_id for this version member.
columns.name: source_record_id

columns.description: stable_digest over exact raw active,ticker,type,name,market,locale,primary_exchange,currency_name,cik,composite_figi,share_class_figi values with missing encoded as JSON null; differing signatures prohibit selection.
columns.name: identity_signature

columns.description: Canonical sorted JSON array over all 13 reviewed provider result-object fields. A selected group may only have [], [last_updated_utc], or [delisted_utc,last_updated_utc]; every other set is unresolved.
columns.name: difference_fields_json

columns.description: Parsed provider metadata revision time used only after exact identity-field agreement.
columns.name: last_updated_at_utc

columns.description: Parsed provider delisted time retained as evidence but never ranked as newer-is-better.
columns.name: delisted_at_utc

columns.description: One-based rank: exact rows sort by page sequence,row ordinal,source record ID; semantic versions sort by last_updated descending then source record ID. All unresolved ranks are null.
columns.name: selection_rank

columns.description: True only for the single auditable winner of a resolved version group.
columns.name: is_selected

columns.description: Exact group status domain: resolved_exact_duplicate, resolved_unique_latest_last_updated, unresolved_identity_conflict, unresolved_timestamp_missing_or_invalid, unresolved_timestamp_tie, or unresolved_difference_set.
columns.name: selection_status

columns.description: Exact row reason domain: selected_min_source_position_exact_duplicate, rejected_later_source_position_exact_duplicate, selected_unique_max_last_updated, rejected_older_last_updated, or the group unresolved status.
columns.name: selection_reason

columns.description: Fixed s4_asset_source_version_selection_v1: canonical-JSON-equivalent provider result objects choose minimum (page sequence,row ordinal,source record ID); otherwise identity signatures and reviewed difference set must agree and unique maximum last_updated wins; delisted and row hash never rank semantic versions.
columns.name: selection_rule_version

columns.description: Winning parent source_record_id repeated on every resolved group member; null for unresolved groups.
columns.name: selected_source_record_id

columns.description: Parent observation Bronze manifest completed_at timestamp.
columns.name: source_capture_at_utc

columns.description: Canonical local Bronze request ID from the authoritative manifest.
columns.name: source_request_id

columns.description: Server-assigned request ID from the Massive response envelope.
columns.name: source_provider_request_id

columns.description: SHA-256 of the stored gzip Bronze page containing this source row.
columns.name: source_artifact_sha256

columns.description: Zero-based page sequence from the manifest-bound paginated response.
columns.name: source_page_sequence

columns.description: Zero-based result ordinal within the source page.
columns.name: source_row_ordinal

columns.description: SHA-256 of canonical JSON for the unmodified provider result object.
columns.name: source_row_hash

description: Audit projection containing every member of each multi-row session/request-active/exact-ticker group, with reproducible difference evidence and fail-closed selection decisions; singleton observations are intentionally excluded.
grain: One source observation belonging to a group with more than one row for exact (session_date, requested_active, ticker).

qa_rules.description: Every output Parquet field, order, Arrow type, and nullability must equal this contract.
Every version row must match exactly one asset_observation_daily parent by session_date and source_record_id.
Version rows must equal the sum of all group sizes greater than one reconstructed from accepted observations.
No singleton observation group may be copied into this multi-version evidence table.
Every version_group_id must reproduce the frozen digest of session_date, requested_active, and exact ticker.
Each group must have version_count greater than one and exactly that many output members.
Every difference_fields_json must reproduce all 13 reviewed provider result-object fields; only [], [last_updated_utc], and [delisted_utc,last_updated_utc] may resolve under v1.
Every identity_signature must reproduce exact active,ticker,type,name,market,locale,primary_exchange,currency_name,cik,composite_figi,share_class_figi values with missing as null.
Status, reason, rank, selected Boolean and selected ID must match the exact frozen domains and ordering in s4_asset_source_version_selection_v1.
Each resolved group must have exactly one selected member and each unresolved group must have zero.
Every non-null selected_source_record_id must name the one selected parent within the same group.
No group with different identity signatures may select a winner.
No semantically distinct group may select a winner without valid parsed last_updated evidence for every member.
No semantically distinct group with a tied maximum last_updated value may select a winner.
No source row hash may decide a winner when raw provider payloads differ semantically.
Every version row must reproduce the complete parent source pointer and hashes.
All multi-version observation members must reconcile to selected, rejected, or unresolved decision rows without loss.
The output must contain no duplicate excess for session_date, version_group_id, and source_record_id.
session_year must equal the four-digit year of session_date.
Unresolved version groups remain preserved for review and block universe_source_daily build or publication.
Groups with different payloads and no unique latest revision remain unresolved rather than being hash-selected.
Groups containing canonical-JSON-equivalent result-object occurrences are disclosed even when a stable source-position winner is allowed.
Groups whose delisted_utc changes are surfaced explicitly; the delisted value is never used as a recency sort key.
Difference-field sets outside the reviewed profile remain unresolved until separately reviewed.
Rows carrying a selection rule marker other than s4_asset_source_version_selection_v1 require review.
